headline: Introducing the Feast app
snippet: Click here to download the Feast app from the iOS store. Click here to download the Feast app from the Google Play store. Ever felt the urge to make a Sunday-level spread with only a Wednesday evening
full_text: Click here to download the Feast app from the iOS store. Click here to download the Feast app from the Google Play store. Ever felt the urge to make a Sunday-level spread with only a Wednesday evening time slot? Perhaps you’ve invited friends round to dinner, only to discover their multiple dietary requirements? Or maybe you (and your family) would like a little excitement and flavour injected into your regular rotation of meals. Whatever your culinary dilemma: this is the recipe app for you. Thousands of brilliant recipes The Feast app will make inspiring mealtimes easy, with brilliant recipes from the Guardian’s food writers. From quick and budget-friendly midweek dinners to show-stopping weekend dishes, you’ll find a huge selection of recipes. The app is curated daily, and new collections and recipes are added every week, so you’ll find ideas for every season and occasion.
